reason: Full requirements and technical approach for user system
PyJWT + bcrypt patterns, refresh token rotation, SQLite schema, FastAPI auth dependencies
React Router v7 Data mode setup, protected routes, token refresh flow, login/register patterns
SQLite + aiosqlite raw SQL conventions for new users/refresh_tokens tables
Error handling patterns for auth 401/403 responses
Async best practices (asyncio.to_thread for bcrypt), type hints
Component naming, Tailwind-only styling, cn() utility for login/register pages
Custom hook patterns for auth state and token management
TypeScript patterns for auth types and API client
